
### cross-site cookie policy changes  {.smaller}


* new cookie attribute <code>SameSite=…</code>:
* <code>Strict</code>: only if same top-level origin making request
* <code>Lax</code> (essentially new default): not on embedded (image/iframe/etc.) requests from different origin 

   * and not POST/etc. requests
   * … but can create popup/etc. window

* <code>None</code>: on all requests
